creator: raimeetravel
caption:
You should think about this when booking travel for the rest of the year! The most important reminder is at the end, of course!! 

.
.
.
Travel advice, travel tips, word news, flight prices, global entry, spring break

transcription.text: I'm changing a lot about how I'm booking travel this year because of the state of the world. I've been very overwhelmed, but at the same time, I know we all still have weddings to go to, family and friends we need to see, trips that we have planned, so here are some ways to save money and take some of the travel stress away. First, I am booking all my flights now. Jet fuel prices are going up. I've already noticed flights I wanted to take later in the year going up. Number two, this is the time to use your points and miles. I always say use them or lose them, and because flights are getting more expensive, this is the perfect time to put your points to use. Just remember, transfer them out of the portal and into the airline partner. Number three, have the mobile passport app downloaded. I have global entry. Maybe you do too, but they've been taking it away, and then it's been coming back. Mobile passport is just a good backup to get you through customs faster, hopefully, and I'm always shocked by how many people aren't using this app. And finally, travel insurance. I would recommend getting cancel-for-any-reason insurance. It's pricey, but it could be worth it. These are some companies that have it, and if you're like me and you've been feeling overwhelmed, maybe even unmotivated to travel, I've been reminding myself that travel is something that truly has the power to change the world. I believe that it makes people more understanding, more compassionate, and the world could use more of that. Okay, safe travels, bye.
